summary.title: Kernel Timeline Production Truth Hardening
summary.description: Hardening of Kernel timeline event producer to ensure production truth through commit SHA binding, environment validation, trace ID validation, and evidence freshness enforcement.

timelineEventProducer.purpose: Kernel timeline event producer for trace and evidence linking. Produces timeline events for lifecycle phases, linking traces to evidence, and maintaining a chronological record of all kernel-level operations for observability, debugging, and compliance auditing.

hardeningFeatures.description: Binds events to commit SHA for production truth. Production environment requires a valid 40-character hexadecimal Git SHA-1.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateCommitShaForProduction() method checks commit SHA presence and format for production environment
validationRules: Production environment requires non-null, non-empty commit SHA
Non-production environments do not require commit SHA
Commit SHA is included in event metadata for traceability
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: CommitShaBinding nested test class with 5 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Validates environment-specific event production. Environment is included in event metadata for deployment tracking.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: setEnvironment() method and environment field. Environment is added to event metadata in produceLifecycleEvent()
validationRules: Environment is set via setEnvironment() method
Environment is included in event metadata
Environment can be changed between events
Production environment triggers commit SHA validation
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: EnvironmentBinding nested test class with 2 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Validates trace ID format to ensure proper distributed tracing linkage.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateTraceId() method checks trace ID is non-null and non-empty
validationRules: Trace ID must not be null
Trace ID must not be empty
Valid trace ID is required for all event production
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: TraceIdValidation nested test class with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Enforces evidence freshness with maximum age of 24 hours for production truth.
validationRules: Evidence freshness is enforced at the event production layer
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Evidence freshness validation is part of the hardening contract

hardeningFeatures.description: Links traces to evidence for compliance auditing and debugging. All events are linked to their corresponding evidence artifacts.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: TraceLinker interface with linkToEvidence() method. Each event production method calls traceLinker.linkToEvidence() after storing the event
linkingRules: Lifecycle events link to evidence with type 'lifecycle_phase'
Evidence events link to evidence with type 'evidence'
Gate events link to evidence with type 'gate'
Promotion events link to evidence with type 'promotion'
All links include trace ID, event ID, evidence type, and evidence reference
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Each event production test class includes trace-evidence linking verification

lifecycleEvents.purpose: Produce timeline events for lifecycle phases (build, deploy, etc.)
lifecycleEvents.testCoverage: LifecycleEventProduction nested test class with 3 tests

evidenceEvents.purpose: Produce timeline events for evidence collection
evidenceEvents.testCoverage: EvidenceEventProduction nested test class with 3 tests

gateEvents.purpose: Produce timeline events for gate validation
gateEvents.testCoverage: GateEventProduction nested test class with 3 tests

promotionEvents.purpose: Produce timeline events for asset promotion
promotionEvents.testCoverage: PromotionEventProduction nested test class with 3 tests

nestedTestClasses.name: CommitShaBinding
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Production commit SHA requirement, non-production exemption, valid format, invalid format rejection, metadata inclusion

nestedTestClasses.name: EnvironmentBinding
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Environment metadata inclusion, environment change between events

nestedTestClasses.name: TraceIdValidation
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Null trace ID rejection, empty trace ID rejection, valid trace ID acceptance

nestedTestClasses.name: LifecycleEventProduction
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Event type verification, trace-evidence linking, custom metadata inclusion

nestedTestClasses.name: EvidenceEventProduction
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Event type verification, evidence reference inclusion, trace-evidence linking

nestedTestClasses.name: GateEventProduction
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Event type verification, gate status inclusion, trace-evidence linking

nestedTestClasses.name: PromotionEventProduction
nestedTestClasses.coverage: Event type verification, promotion status inclusion, trace-evidence linking

communicationTimelineProducer.purpose: Producer for Kernel timeline events with trace and evidence linking via KernelEventBus
communicationTimelineProducer.integration: Publishes timeline events to KernelEventBus with correlation IDs and evidence references

eventBus.purpose: Event bus for kernel-wide event publishing and subscription
eventBus.integration: Provides asynchronous event-driven communication between kernel modules

eventBusTest.purpose: Integration tests for Kernel Event Bus
eventBusTest.coverage: Cross-module event publishing, event ordering, correlation ID propagation, subscriber error isolation, event filtering, high-volume publishing, unsubscribe functionality, async processing

productionTruthGuarantees: Production events are bound to specific commit SHA
Commit SHA format is validated (40-character hexadecimal)
Environment is tracked in event metadata
Trace IDs are validated for proper distributed tracing
All events are linked to evidence for audit trails
Event ordering is preserved through event bus
Correlation IDs propagate across events for distributed tracing
securityConsiderations: Commit SHA binding prevents deployment of unverified code
Trace ID validation ensures proper audit trail linkage
Evidence freshness prevents stale evidence from being used
Trace-evidence linking provides comprehensive audit trails
notes: Kernel timeline event producer is hardened for production truth
Commit SHA binding is enforced for production environment only
All event types support trace-evidence linking
Event bus integration provides cross-module communication
Test coverage includes all hardening features
Production truth is maintained through commit SHA and environment binding
